message:
fix: Add env_map to all Child.run/spawn calls on Linux

Fix Linux panic "ChildProcess implementation has no way to collect
the environment variables" by explicitly passing env_map to:

- src/codegen/query_jit.zig (JIT compile)
- src/codegen/metal0_jit.zig (logic table compile)
- src/cli/serve.zig (browser open)
